subject: Year 6 Trip Payment Reminder
body: Reminder that payment for the Year 6 science museum trip is due by Friday 6 March. The trip will take place on Thursday 12 March from 09:00 to 15:00.
gold_summary: Science museum trip on 12 March; payment due by 6 March.

subject: Football Club Cancelled
body: Please note that football club after school tomorrow has been cancelled due to staff illness.
gold_summary: Football club on 3 March has been cancelled.

subject: Parents Evening Booking
body: Parents evening will be held on 18 March from 16:30 to 19:00. Please reply by Monday 9 March to confirm your preferred slot.
gold_summary: Parents evening is on 18 March; reply by 9 March to confirm.

subject: PE Kit Reminder
body: Please ensure your child brings their PE kit on Thursday 5 March.
gold_summary: Bring PE kit on 5 March.

subject: Newsletter Update
body: This week's newsletter is now available on the school website and includes updates on recent activities.
gold_summary: Newsletter update with no event or action required.

subject: Year 5 History Trip Consent Form
body: The Year 5 history trip to the Roman Museum will take place on 19 March. Please return the signed consent form by 12 March.
gold_summary: Roman Museum trip on 19 March; consent form due by 12 March.

subject: Parents Evening Confirmation
body: Parents evening will take place on 24 March from 16:00 to 19:30. Please reply by 18 March to confirm whether you will attend.
gold_summary: Parents evening is on 24 March; reply by 18 March to confirm.

subject: Drama Club Rehearsal Reminder
body: Drama club rehearsal will take place on 17 March in the school hall. Please ensure your child brings their costume.
gold_summary: Drama club rehearsal on 17 March; bring costume.

subject: Residential Deposit Reminder
body: A deposit of £40 for the summer residential is due by 20 March. This payment is needed to secure your child's place.
gold_summary: Residential deposit payment is due by 20 March.

subject: Swimming Lesson Cancelled
body: Please note that the swimming lesson scheduled for 8 March has been cancelled due to staff illness.
gold_summary: Swimming lesson on 8 March has been cancelled.

subject: Reading Book Reminder
body: Please ensure your child brings their reading book on 11 March for the class reading session.
gold_summary: Bring reading book on 11 March.

subject: Website Maintenance Notice
body: The school website will be unavailable for routine maintenance this Sunday morning. No action is required from parents.
gold_summary: Website maintenance notice with no event or action required.

subject: Science Centre Trip Final Payment
body: The Science Centre trip will take place on 26 March from 08:30 to 16:00. Final payment must be made by 18 March.
gold_summary: Science Centre trip on 26 March; final payment due by 18 March.

subject: Attendance Confirmation Needed
body: The attendance review meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 15:45. Please confirm by 12:00 tomorrow if you are able to attend.
gold_summary: Attendance review meeting on 10 March; confirm by 10 March.

subject: Netball Training Update
body: This is a reminder that netball training will go ahead on 21 March at 10:00. The session will still run even if the weather is cold, and pupils should arrive a few minutes early because the sports hall doors will be locked once practice begins. Please attend if your child is available.
gold_summary: Netball training on 21 March; attendance required.

subject: Place Confirmation for Workshop
body: Your child's place on the creative workshop can only be secured once the contribution has been received by 22 March.
gold_summary: Workshop payment is due by 22 March.

subject: Choir Rehearsal Change
body: Due to a hall booking issue, choir rehearsal planned for tomorrow has been cancelled.
gold_summary: Choir rehearsal on 11 March has been cancelled.

subject: Geography Field Trip Reminder
body: The geography field trip will take place on 28 March from 09:00 to 14:30. Please bring a packed lunch and return the final information slip by 20 March.
gold_summary: Geography field trip on 28 March; bring a packed lunch.

subject: Curriculum Information Evening Form
body: Curriculum Information Evening will be held on 25 March at 18:00. Please submit the attendance form by 17 March.
gold_summary: Curriculum Information Evening on 25 March; submit form by 17 March.

subject: Chess Club Place Confirmation
body: Chess club will run on 29 March in Room 14. Please reply by 24 March if your child would like to attend.
gold_summary: Chess club on 29 March; reply by 24 March to confirm.
